commandsRun.observation: All 40 Alcotest cases passed, including positive cases 13-14 and 18 plus negative cases 15-20 covering the repaired behaviors.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 15-20
commandsRun.observation: Only the six regression-focused negative cases ran; all passed and the other 34 tests were skipped.

frictions: The Alcotest CLI output shows case names and pass/fail state but not the underlying diagnostic strings, so expected failure substrings were confirmed from test/test_typecheck.ml.
